sod_risk: Single person approving and recording vendor invoices
mitigation: Separate invoice approval from journal entry posting

sod_risk: Accountant who records also approves
mitigation: Assign dedicated AP processor separate from approver

sod_risk: Controller reconciles entries they also posted
mitigation: Assign independent reconciler for AP ledger

sod_risk: Treasury holds payments and approves invoices
mitigation: Separate treasury custody from invoice authorization

sod_risk: Sales raises and records invoices
mitigation: Finance to independently raise invoices based on confirmed orders

sod_risk: AR accountant records and verifies own entries
mitigation: Assign independent AR reviewer

sod_risk: Controller reconciles AR they also posted
mitigation: Assign independent AR reconciler

sod_risk: Treasury receives cash and records receipts
mitigation: Separate cash custody from AR recording

sod_risk: HR approves and reviews own payroll entries
mitigation: Finance to independently approve payroll before processing

sod_risk: Payroll accountant authorizes and processes
mitigation: HR Manager to authorize; payroll team to process only

sod_risk: Controller reviews payroll they also processed
mitigation: Assign independent payroll reviewer separate from processor

sod_risk: Payroll team holds bank details and processes payments
mitigation: Separate custody of bank details from payroll processing

sod_risk: Accountant posts and approves own journals
mitigation: Require secondary approval for all manual journal entries

sod_risk: Manager who approves also posts journals
mitigation: Segregate journal posting from journal approval

sod_risk: Controller reconciles accounts they also posted
mitigation: Assign reconciliation to staff not involved in posting

sod_risk: Systems team manages COA and approves changes
mitigation: Finance Controller to approve all COA changes; IT to implement only

sod_risk: CFO authorizes and records asset additions
mitigation: CFO authorizes; accountant records separately

sod_risk: Accountant records and verifies own asset entries
mitigation: Separate asset recording from verification

sod_risk: Controller verifies assets they also hold
mitigation: Assign independent team for physical asset verification

sod_risk: Operations holds assets and approves disposals
mitigation: Finance to separately authorize all asset disposals

sod_risk: CFO authorizes payments and holds signing authority
mitigation: Dual authorization required for all bank payments above threshold

sod_risk: Treasury processes and authorizes own payments
mitigation: Separate payment processing from authorization; require dual approval

sod_risk: Controller reconciles accounts they also manage
mitigation: Assign independent bank reconciler not involved in payment processing

sod_risk: Treasury holds credentials and processes transactions
mitigation: Implement dual custody for bank credentials; restrict access to authorized signatories only

sod_risk: Procurement approves and holds vendor relationships
mitigation: Finance to co-approve POs above threshold; procurement to manage vendors only

sod_risk: Analyst raises and approves own POs
mitigation: Require manager approval before PO is raised

sod_risk: Operations verifies and records own receipts
mitigation: Finance to independently verify goods receipt against PO

sod_risk: AP team manages vendor data and approves payments
mitigation: IT / Finance Controls to separately manage vendor master; AP to process only
